item: Revenue FY2024 Q4 = FY minus YTD_Q3
detail: FY 60,922M - YTD_Q3 38,819M = Q4 22,103M; quarterly sum = FY total exactly

item: Revenue FY2025 Q4 = FY minus YTD_Q3
detail: FY 130,497M - YTD_Q3 91,166M = Q4 39,331M; quarterly sum = FY total exactly

item: Revenue FY2026 Q4 = FY minus YTD_Q3
detail: FY 215,938M - YTD_Q3 147,811M = Q4 68,127M; quarterly sum = FY total exactly

item: Cost of Revenue FY2025 quarterly sum vs FY
detail: Quarterly sum $32,638M vs FY $32,639M — $1M rounding gap. Caused by YTD_Q3 ($22,031M) differing from standalone Q1+Q2+Q3 sum ($22,030M) by $1M. Arithmetically consistent with filed XBRL values.

item: Operating Income FY2024 quarterly sum vs FY
detail: Quarterly sum $32,971M vs FY $32,972M — $1M rounding gap. Same root cause as Cost of Revenue: standalone quarterly totals and YTD figures differ by $1M in XBRL.

item: Operating Income FY2025 quarterly sum vs FY
detail: Quarterly sum $81,454M vs FY $81,453M — $1M rounding gap (opposite direction).

item: Net Income FY2024 quarterly sum vs FY
detail: Quarterly sum $29,759M vs FY $29,760M — $1M rounding gap.

item: R&D Expense FY2024 quarterly sum vs FY
detail: Quarterly sum $8,674M vs FY $8,675M — $1M rounding gap.

item: Operating Cash Flow FY2024-2026 Q4
detail: All three FY totals reconcile exactly (cumulative YTD subtraction)

item: Capital Expenditure FY2025-2026 Q4
detail: FY totals reconcile exactly for FY2025 and FY2026

item: Derived GP vs reported GrossProfit XBRL tag
detail: FY2024 diff=0; FY2025 diff=$1M (derived $97,859M vs reported $97,858M — rounding); FY2026 diff=0. The $1M FY2025 gap is consistent with the Cost of Revenue rounding issue.

item: Cash and Cash Equivalents Q4 uses FY-end balance
detail: FY2024=$7,280M, FY2025=$8,589M, FY2026=$10,605M; all from 10-K fiscal_year_end_balance

item: Total Debt (LongTermDebt) Q4 uses FY-end balance
detail: FY2024=$9,709M, FY2025=$8,463M, FY2026=$8,468M; all from 10-K fiscal_year_end_balance

item: Capital Expenditure FY2024 Q1-Q3
detail: PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets has no Q1 or Q2 YTD entries for fy=2024. Only Q3 YTD and FY exist. The tag's quarterly coverage begins with fy=2025. Q4 FY2024 is derived correctly (FY minus Q3 YTD). Q1-Q3 are flagged missing_requires_review.

item: Diluted EPS Q4 (FY2024-2026)
detail: EPS cannot be derived by subtraction; 3 quarters flagged missing_requires_review. Source from Nvidia earnings press releases.

item: Revenue tag: Revenues
detail: Same tag as Qualcomm. RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax exists but only has FY-level entries and stopped at FY2022.

item: Cost of Revenue tag: CostOfRevenue
detail: Same tag as Qualcomm. CostOfGoodsAndServicesSold exists but only has FY-level entries up to FY2021.

item: CapEx tag: PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets
detail: Same broader tag as Qualcomm. PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment only has data through FY2012. FY2024 Q1-Q3 coverage gap is a known limitation.

item: Total Debt tag: LongTermDebt (single instant)
detail: Includes noncurrent + current portion. Cross-check FY2026: LTD $8,468M = Noncurrent $7,469M + Current $999M. Consistent Q1-Q3-FY coverage.

item: Nvidia uses 52/53-week fiscal year ending last Sunday of January
detail: FY2024 ended 2024-01-28, FY2025 ended 2025-01-26, FY2026 ended 2026-01-25. All 363 days. Nvidia FY numbers are one higher than calendar year: FY2026 covers calendar Feb 2025 to Jan 2026.

item: Nvidia does not file a standalone Q4 10-Q
detail: Same pattern as Qualcomm and AMD: three 10-Qs (Q1-Q3) plus one 10-K.

item: Multiple $1M rounding gaps in quarterly sums vs FY totals
detail: Nvidia's XBRL filings contain $1M rounding differences between standalone quarterly values and cumulative YTD values. This affects Cost of Revenue FY2025; Operating Income FY2024 and FY2025; Net Income FY2024; R&D Expense FY2024. All gaps are exactly $1M and are artifacts of the XBRL data, not pipeline errors. The pipeline arithmetic is correct given the input values.
